title: Spacelords

title: Spacelords

notes:
Using Antergos you need to run through Steam RUNTIME since Steam Native won't connect to the servers.
Tested a like 5 or 6 missions and all of them worked perfectly. I didn't managed to get any achievement (already have the easy ones) so i can't confirm if those are working.
When using the Steam interface inside the game the cursor is invisible, if you want to accept a friend invite you should ALT+TAB for accepting it.
